columns.extraction_plan: The overall risk judgment is not explicitly stated, but the study is described as a "multicentre, open-label, randomised, phase 3 study with a 2 x 2 factorial design". This implies a rigorous design, but a risk of bias may be present due to the open-label nature. Further assessment of individual criteria of evidence (COE) would be needed to determine the overall risk judgment. The discussion section also mentions limitations associated with open-label trials.
